parsed.production_notes: The top panel features an AI-generated avatar with slightly stiff facial movements and perfectly smooth skin. The bottom panel and subsequent scenes are human-recorded with natural lighting, movement, and a real-world cafe setting.

characters.appearance: Female, 20s, medium build, brown complexion, long dark hair, bindi. Professional and smiling.
characters.wardrobe: Blue blouse and an orange/blue sari.

characters.appearance: Female, 20s, slim build, brown complexion, long dark hair.
characters.wardrobe: Yellow sleeveless top and blue jeans.

characters.appearance: Male, 20s, medium build, brown complexion, short dark hair, wearing glasses.

scenes.setting: Top: Neutral background with white curtains. Bottom: Outdoor cafe with yellow chairs, black table, food posters on the wall. Daytime.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A facing forward, smiling. Neutral background with white curtains.

Character B and Character C sitting at a black cafe table. Character B is on the left, wearing a yellow top, looking at a large menu. Character C is on the right, wearing a black t-shirt and glasses, holding a smartphone up in his right hand, looking at it. A paper cup is on the table.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with a horizontal division. The top half shows Character A against a neutral background. The bottom half shows Character B and Character C sitting at an outdoor cafe table. Text overlays appear in the center of the screen, translating the spoken dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: నేను ఇక్కడ టీ తాగడానికి వచ్చాను. [I came here to have tea.]
Character A says: I came here to have tea.
Character C says: I came here to have tea.
Character A says: ఈ టీ చాలా వేడిగా ఉంది. [This tea is very hot.]
Character A says: This tea is very hot.
Character C says: This tea is very hot.
Character A says: ఈ టీ నాకు చాలా టేస్టీగా అనిపిస్తుంది. [I really like the taste of this tea.]
Character A says: I really like the taste of this tea.
Character C says: I really like the taste of this tea.
scenes.on_screen_text: Nenu ikkada tea tagataniki vachanu I came here to have tea. I came here to have tea. Ee tea chala vediga undi This tea is very hot. This tea is very hot. Ee tea naaku chala tasty ga anipistundi. I really like the taste of this tea. I really like the taste of this tea.

panels.panel_visual_description: Over-the-shoulder shot past Character C's right shoulder, focusing on Character B. Character B is sitting at the cafe table, holding a large menu, looking at Character C with a questioning expression. A paper cup is on the table. The background shows a pharmacy storefront.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot focusing on Character B at the cafe. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: బ్రో, ఎవరి దగ్గర నుంచి ఇంగ్లీష్ నేర్చుకుంటున్నావ్? [Bro, from whom are you learning English?]

panels.panel_visual_description: Over-the-shoulder shot past Character B's left shoulder, focusing on Character C. Character C is sitting at the cafe table, wearing glasses and a black t-shirt, holding his phone. The background shows a food menu poster on a glass window.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot focusing on Character C at the cafe. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: SpeakX యాప్‌లో AI టీచర్‌తో. [With the AI teacher on the SpeakX app.]
scenes.on_screen_text: SpeakX App lo AI teacher tho.

panels.panel_visual_description: Over-the-shoulder shot past Character C's right shoulder, focusing on Character B. Character B is sitting at the cafe table, looking confused. The menu is on the table. The background shows a pharmacy storefront.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot focusing on Character B at the cafe. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: నాకు అర్థం కాలేదు. [I didn't understand.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Over-the-shoulder shot past Character B's left shoulder, focusing on Character C. Character C is sitting at the cafe table, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The background shows a food menu poster on a glass window.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot focusing on Character C at the cafe. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: ఇది ఒక యాప్. ఇక్కడ AI టీచర్ ద్వారా ప్రతిరోజూ ఇంగ్లీష్ ప్రాక్టీస్ చేయొచ్చు నువ్వు. [This is an app. Here you can practice English every day through an AI teacher.]
Character C says: ఇంకా నీకు తెలుసు కదా, ఇంగ్లీష్ లేకుండా రెస్పెక్ట్ కూడా రాదు, జాబ్ కూడా కష్టమే. [And you know, right, without English there is no respect, and getting a job is also difficult.]
Character C says: అందుకే నేను SpeakX యాప్‌లో రోజుకి 10 టు 15 మినిట్స్ ప్రాక్టీస్ చేస్తున్నాను. [That's why I am practicing 10 to 15 minutes a day on the SpeakX app.]
Character C says: ఇప్పటికి 10 రోజులు అయింది, అండ్ దట్స్ వై ఐ కెన్ స్పీక్ ఇంగ్లీష్ సో కాన్ఫిడెంట్లీ వితౌట్ ఎనీ ఫియర్. [It's been 10 days so far, and that's why I can speak English so confidently without any fear.]
scenes.on_screen_text: idi oka app ikkada AI teacher dwara priti roju English practice cheyyachu. Neeku telusu kada, English lekunda respect kuda raadhu Job kuda kastam Anduke SpeakX app lo roju ki 10 to 15 minutes Practice Ippatiki 10 days ayyayi I can speak English so confidently without any fear.

panels.panel_visual_description: Over-the-shoulder shot past Character C's right shoulder, focusing on Character B. Character B is sitting at the cafe table, looking slightly concerned. The menu is on the table. The background shows a pharmacy storefront.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot focusing on Character B at the cafe. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: నాకు కూడా ఇంగ్లీష్ నేర్చుకోవాలని ఉంది, కానీ కోర్సెస్ చాలా కాస్ట్లీ కదా. [I also want to learn English, but courses are very costly, right.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Over-the-shoulder shot past Character B's left shoulder, focusing on Character C. Character C is sitting at the cafe table, gesturing with his hands. The background shows a food menu poster on a glass window.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot focusing on Character C at the cafe. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character C says: ఈ యాప్ చాలా చీప్. రోజుకి ఓన్లీ 4 రూపీస్, అండ్ ఆల్సో 7 డేస్ కి ఫ్రీ ట్రయల్ కూడా ఇస్తారు వీళ్ళు. [This app is very cheap. Only 4 rupees a day, and they also give a 7-day free trial.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Ee app chala cheapu Rojkiu only 4 rupees and also 7 days ki free trial kuda istharu.

panels.panel_visual_description: Over-the-shoulder shot past Character C's right shoulder, focusing on Character B. Character B looks excited, then picks up her smartphone from the table and starts tapping on it. The background shows a pharmacy storefront.

scenes.visual_description: A single-panel shot focusing on Character B at the cafe. Text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen with the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: అరె వాహ్! ఒక్క నిమిషం, SpeakX యాప్ నేను కూడా ఇప్పుడే డౌన్‌లోడ్ చేస్తాను. [Oh wow! One minute, I will also download the SpeakX app right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text: Arey wah!! okka nimisham SpeakX app nenu kuda ippude download chesthanu.
